title: Senior Software Engineer
text:
We're hiring a Senior Software Engineer!

Requirements:
- 5+ years of Python experience
- Experience with Django, Flask, FastAPI
- AWS or GCP cloud experience
- Bachelor's in Computer Science

Location: Remote (US)
Competitive salary + equity

title: Machine Learning Engineer
text:
Join our ML team! Looking for a Machine Learning Engineer with:

- 3+ years of ML experience
- PyTorch or TensorFlow
- Computer Vision or NLP experience
- PhD or Master's preferred

We offer competitive compensation and the chance to work on cutting-edge AI projects.

title: Backend Engineer
text:
Cloud Systems is hiring Backend Engineers!

What we're looking for:
- Strong Java or Go experience
- Kubernetes and Docker
- Microservices architecture
- SQL and NoSQL databases

Remote-first company with great benefits!
